title: Zinia's Watercolor & Butterflies Layout
excerpt: Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I’m back with a really fun mixed media layout using mainly the Sunshine & Good Times collection by Amy Tangerine and American Crafts. I was really inspired by the clear butterflies that are…
body:
Hello everyone! It’s Zinia here and today I’m back with a really fun mixed media layout using mainly the Sunshine & Good Times collection by Amy Tangerine and American Crafts.

I was really inspired by the clear butterflies that are included in the sticker book of this collection so I decided to create a watercolor background using matching colors.

I really hope you got inspired to create a fun pastel watercolor background with your supplies and document your beautiful memories. Until next time, happy crafting.

Zinia

Blog | Instagram | Twitter | Facebook

Thanks so much for sharing this clever and colorful layout, Zinia! Other Design Team member posts can be found here. Shop Sunshine and Good Times at your local retailer or on Scrapbook.com
